title: Blue Canyon Digital Bathrrom Scales (White)
description: Product Description A FULLY MANAGED SUPPLY CHAIN OF HOUSEHOLD RANGES Our home and bathroom accessory ranges are constantly changing to meet and adapt to design trends in; bathroom textiles, bathroom accessories, laundry and storage – providing a full homeware range to our clients. An introduction to Blue Canyon... Luxury By Design Blue Canyon are at the forefront of Bathroom Accessory and Homeware manufacturing and distribution. Having built an enviable supply chain of proven providers during the course of 30 years’ experience in the bathroom accessory industries, Blue Canyon have a global reach in manufacturing that ensures the smoothest of operations and supply. Bathroom Scales Mechanical Scales Want to keep it tradition then these quality mechanical bathroom scales are the one for you. No buttons, no batteries, no hassle! Available in a Cork and white finish. Digital Scales Blue Canyon have an extensive range of digital bathroom scales in varying colours to suit your bathroom whatever the style. High precision gauge sensor to get ensure you get accurate measurements. Digital LED Scales Modernise your bathroom scales to the max with the Digital LED scales. Easy to read display, measure your weight in kg, st or lb. Bathroom Scales Visit Our Brand Store To view the full range of blue canyon products please scroll to the top of the page and click on the visit brand store; you can be sure to find quality stylish items at affordable prices.
